nasb.text: And Moses made a bronze serpent and set it on the standard; and it came about, that if a serpent bit any man, when he looked to the bronze serpent, he lived.

esv.text: So Moses made a bronze serpent and set it on a pole. And if a serpent bit anyone, he would look at the bronze serpent and live.

cnv.text: 摩西就做了一條銅蛇，掛在杆上；被蛇咬了的人，一望這銅蛇，就活了。

ccb.text: 摩西就造了一条铜蛇，挂在杆子上。被蛇咬的人一望铜蛇，就保住了性命。
